ModMetaData.name: Milira Race (HSK/CE Patched, All-in-One)
ModMetaData.author: Ancot — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction; CE patches by pntfvur
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched all-in-one fork of the Milira Race mod.
ABSORBED MODS (do not enable separately): - Milira Race (workshop 3256974620, Ancot) - Milira Race Gene Patch (workshop 3257000248, Ancot) - Milira CE Patch (workshop 3410567648, pntfvur)
All three are bundled. Disable the originals and enable this fork instead.
--- HSK CONVERSIONS ---
* All raw ore costs converted to HSK refined materials: - Steel -> SteelBar - Gold -> GoldBar - Silver -> SilverBar - Uranium -> DepletedUranium - Plasteel -> Plasteel (HSK refined, kept as-is)
* Weapon recipes follow HSK class-component pipeline where applicable: - Pistol-tier -> Pistol_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic - Rifle-tier -> AdvRifle_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic - Heavy-tier -> Heavy_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic
* Apparel rebalanced to HSK premium-craftable patterns where applicable.
* CE patches load conditionally via Patches-CE/ when CE is active.
* Biotech gene patch merged into 1.5/Mods/Biotech (only loads with Biotech DLC).
Original mod by Ancot. CE patches by pntfvur. HSK conversion + bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Humanoid Alien Races, Ancot Library.
